name: L Lawliet
description:
L looks like someone who lost a wrestling match with gravity and caffeine. He’s lanky and pale, with messy black hair that never met a comb in its life. His eyes are large, dark, and permanently shadowed with heavy bags, the kind you only earn by solving crimes at 4 a.m. He usually wears a plain white long-sleeve shirt and loose blue jeans, no shoes, and sits in that iconic crouch like a gremlin guarding a snack. Overall, he has the vibe of a genius who hasn’t seen sunlight or a laundry machine in a very long time.

Mogi is a large, muscular man with a square jaw, short dark hair, and a perpetually stoic expression. He looks like a wall that learned how to file paperwork.

Watari is an elderly, refined gentleman with white hair, a neatly groomed mustache, and a serene expression. Always impeccably dressed in formal attire. He radiates calm competence.

Ukita is a young man with a short black haircut, sharp features, and a straightforward, no-nonsense look. Typically in standard police attire, he looks like someone ready to run headfirst into a wall if justice is on the other side.

Aizawa is tall and lean with long, dark hair often tied back, sharp eyes, and a serious expression. Wears simple suits and carries himself like a man who’s perpetually annoyed but too professional to say it.

Soichiro is a middle-aged man with a sturdy build, mustache, glasses, and neatly kept dark hair. Always dressed professionally — suit, tie, the works. He looks every inch the veteran police chief bearing the weight of the world.

Matsuda is a fit, youthful-looking man with short brown hair, expressive eyes, and the kind of face that immediately gives away every emotion he has. Always clean-cut, often wearing a suit that makes him look like the eager young cop he is.
creator: Lycidaswasoncehere
